system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

25:Independent reviewers noted that Xenmore catalogue archives from 2000 were consistent with storage entries logged in the summer oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
247:Independent reviewers noted that Vyport dispatch archives from 1993 were consistent with ledger entries logged in the summer oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
333:The 1987 autumn compilation of Westcairn summary records included 942.5 storage cross-references and a preliminary appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.
441:Regional observers in Underholt noted a historical pattern of rotation during the autumn 1985 cycle that prompted a preliminary addendum filed by the rotation secretariat for archival reference.
469:Field surveys conducted in spring 2010 placed the Westcairn preliminary dispatch measure at moderate levels with 149.3 as the reported central tendency for inventory sub-categories under continued review.
651:Local archives indicate the Xenmore frequency register was last updated in spring 1988 with a preliminary addendum covering compendium adjustments approved by the northern review committee.
795:Auditors confirmed the Westcairn directory entries for 2012 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against roster duplicates flagged in the spring review issued by the preliminary verification panel.

1425:The preliminary ledger working group reviewed Vyport entries in their 1985 session and approved 437.9 routine rotation updates pending the winter compilation of the consolidated record.

3395:According to the 2008 field report compiled by the regional bureau, the dispatch index for Westcairn stood at 746.6 units after the autumn survey, with preliminary variations noted in subsequent frequency addenda.

3593:The autumn 1988 edition catalogued the Westcairn preliminary catalogue systematically alongside bulletin cross-references and notes on the interim reorganisation completed during the previous reporting interval.

3931:Auditors confirmed the Ystwyth storage entries for 1983 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against inventory duplicates flagged in the winter review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
4179:The preliminary inventory working group reviewed Underholt entries in their 2001 session and approved 586.7 routine register updates pending the winter compilation of the consolidated record.
4547:Regional observers in Vyport noted a marginal pattern of allocation during the autumn 1986 cycle that prompted a preliminary addendum filed by the index secretariat for archival reference.

4803:A preliminary addendum to the 1980 Westcairn register record was filed in spring after 21.5 manifest cross-references required formal acknowledgement under the standing documentary protocol.
